inputs.command:
set -e
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl git jq gnupg
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs
npm install -g @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.bun/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"
mkdir -p /workspace/e2e
curl --version | head -n 1 > /workspace/e2e/curl-version.txt
jq --version > /workspace/e2e/jq-version.txt
node --version > /workspace/e2e/node-version.txt
npm --version > /workspace/e2e/npm-version.txt
pi --version > /workspace/e2e/pi-version.txt

set -e
mkdir -p /workspace/e2e
test -s /workspace/.runpod_agentic/harness/pi/models.json
test -s /workspace/.runpod_agentic/harness/pi/providers.json
jq . /workspace/.runpod_agentic/harness/pi/models.json > /workspace/e2e/pi-models-normalized.json
jq . /workspace/.runpod_agentic/harness/pi/providers.json > /workspace/e2e/pi-providers-normalized.json
find /workspace/.codex/skills -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name 'SKILL.md' -o -name '*.md' \) | sort | sed 's#^/workspace/.codex/skills/##' > /workspace/e2e/skills.txt

inputs.system_prompt: You are a CRAG local-runtime verification agent. Answer concisely and mention whether skill files were visible.

inputs.prompt: List the first few skill files available to you, then say that the DeepSeek v4 flash Ollama Cloud call succeeded.
